projects.name: Autonomous Drone Navigation
projects.summary: Developed obstacle avoidance firmware for a custom quadcopter using ROS 2 and C++. Integrated LiDAR and IMU sensor fusion with Extended Kalman Filter. Deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 with real-time kernel achieving 50Hz control loop. Won 2nd place at Purdue Robotics Competition 2025.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
projects.summary: Built an IoT soil-moisture monitoring network with 8 Arduino Mega nodes and central Raspberry Pi hub. Wrote C firmware for ATmega2560 to read ADC sensor data and transmit via MQTT. System monitors 0.5 acres of greenhouse plants with measurable water savings.

projects.name: Custom RTOS Scheduler
projects.summary: Implemented a preemptive RTOS kernel in C for ARM Cortex-M4 (STM32F411). Features include round-robin scheduling, semaphores, mutexes, and priority inheritance. Validated with oscilloscope probing achieving <5μs context switch overhead.

impact_highlights.description: Autonomous Drone Navigation system achieved 50Hz control loop on Raspberry Pi 4 with real-time kernel, demonstrating production-ready embedded systems performance.
Smart Irrigation System deployed across 0.5 acres of greenhouse plants with measurable water conservation impact.
impact_highlights.metric: ~30% reduction in water usage; 0.5 acres monitored
